message:
feat: BigInt support for Python-compatible arbitrary precision integers

- Add parseBigIntUnicode for Unicode digit parsing (Devanagari, Arabic, etc.)
- Make int() with runtime strings return BigInt for overflow safety
- Use try instead of catch unreachable to allow error propagation in try/except
- Fix BigInt comparison in assertEqual (BigInt vs i128/i64)
- Split assign.zig and body.zig into focused submodules
- test_int.py now passes 290 tests
